summary: Iteration 18 frontend testing complete. All 5 requested features tested and verified: 1) Wave grid Add/Remove Month buttons, 2) Comments column in wave grid, 3) Sidebar dark theme with white YASH logo and blue right-edge active nav border, 4) YASH logo click navigates to dashboard, 5) Approver Save Changes button for in_review projects, 6) Made with Emergent badge is hidden.

issues: Console warnings about invalid HTML nesting (<tr>/<td>/<th> inside <span>) from dynamic array rendering. This is a React hydration warning that doesn't affect functionality but should be addressed for cleaner console output.
Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - chart sizing issue during initial render but displays correctly after load.

critical_code_review_comments: HTML structure warning in Dashboard: <span> elements wrapping <tr> inside <tbody> causes React hydration warnings. Consider using React.Fragment instead of span for array iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 tested 5 features: 1) Add Month/Remove Month buttons in wave grid toolbar - working with toast feedback, 2) Comments column at end of wave grid with textareas for each resource row, 3) Sidebar dark theme (#0B1120) with white YASH logo (yash-logo-white.jpg), 4) Active nav item has border-r-[3px] border-r-[#3B82F6] for blue right accent, 5) Approver can see Save Changes purple button when editing in_review projects, 6) Made with Emergent badge is hidden (display: none !important). Test project PRJ-0004 (ID: 37482dc9-7743-4197-9e02-15dd76a04b3d) has 5 resources and 5 months in wave.

features_tested.wave_grid_add_month_button: PASS - Button visible with + icon, adds new month column
features_tested.wave_grid_remove_month_button: PASS - Button visible with - icon, removes last month column with toast feedback
features_tested.wave_grid_comments_column: PASS - Comments header visible in table, 5 textareas with data-testid='comment-{id}' for each resource row
features_tested.sidebar_white_yash_logo: PASS - yash-logo-white.jpg displayed in sidebar header
features_tested.sidebar_active_nav_border: PASS - Active nav has className including 'border-r-[3px] border-r-[#3B82F6] rounded-r-none'
features_tested.sidebar_logo_click_navigation: PASS - Clicking YASH logo navigates to /dashboard
features_tested.saved_projects_yash_logo: PASS - yash-logo-new.png displayed next to 'Saved Projects' heading
features_tested.approver_save_changes_button: PASS - Purple 'Save Changes' button visible when admin user edits in_review project
